recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Buzz Lightyear must battle Emperor Zurg with the help of three hopefuls who insist on being his partners.

recommendations.title: The Return of Jafar

recommendations.director: Tad Stones, Alan Zaslove, Toby Shelton

recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action
recommendations.overview: Milo and Kida reunite with their friends to investigate strange occurances around the world that seem to have links to the secrets of Atlantis.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Tad Stones, Toby Shelton

recommendations.title: Hellboy Animated: Blood and Iron
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hellboy, Liz Sherman, and Abe Sapien are assigned to investigate the ghost-infested mansion of a publicity-hound billionaire, they uncover a plot to resurrect a beautiful yet monstrous vampire from Professor Bruttenholm’s past. But before they c

recommendations.title: Dragons: Gift of the Night Fury
recommendations.overview: Hiccup and Toothless go on an exciting adventure and discover an island of new dragons.

recommendations.title: The Road to El Dorado
recommendations.overview: Stowing away after a failed con, a pair of swindlers end up on El Dorado, the fabled "city of gold", where they quickly get in over their heads when they are mistaken as gods by the inhabitants.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: Aladdin
recommendations.overview: A kindhearted street urchin named Aladdin embarks on a magical adventure after finding a lamp that releases a wisecracking genie while a power-hungry Grand Vizier vies for the same lamp that has the power to make their deepest wishes come true.
